## RABA Status

Select the highest status this PR touches:

- [ ] Draft / working note

## Block 5 Verification Status

For Level 0–1 changes, this section may be kept short and non-relevant text fields may be left blank or removed.

For Level 2–4 changes, canon-related changes, GitHub state changes, public/provider-facing use, partner-facing use, commercial claims, validation claims, adoption claims, compliance claims, certification claims, or roadmap claims, explicit text is required.

Verification level:

- [ ] Level 0 — Draft / working material
- [ ] Level 1 — Review aid / internal note
- [ ] Level 2 — Decision-support candidate
- [ ] Level 3 — Decision basis / high consequence
- [ ] Level 4 — External / provider-facing / difficult-to-reverse

Critical claims requiring human review:

> Required for Level 2–4.


Sources checked by human:

> Required for Level 2–4. Name original sources inspected directly, not only AI-prepared summaries.


Sources extracted for human review:

> Links, citations, file paths, source names, or source passages prepared for human inspection.


Remaining uncertainty:

> Required for Level 2–4.


Human Rationale:

> Required for Level 3–4 and any canon, public, provider-facing, partner-facing, commercial, validation, adoption, compliance, certification, or roadmap claim.


What remains blocked:

> Required for Level 2–4.


## Boundary

- [ ] This PR does not create canon unless explicitly approved by the Human Owner.
- [ ] This PR does not create public, provider-facing, partner-facing, commercial, validation, adoption, compliance, certification, or roadmap claims unless explicitly approved by the Human Owner.
- [ ] AI-prepared review material is treated as a review aid, not as Human Owner approval.
